description: End-to-end gate for the second council (City of Melville) per the per-council recipe. 'expected' is the acceptance target; 'recorded' is the real verification result on prod.

recorded.method: LIVE auto-resolution via verify_beeliar.py --address '27 DUNVEGAN ROAD APPLECROSS' --other-council 'City of Cockburn' (the harness is council-agnostic). Full run: reports/melville_canary_run.json.

cross_council.probe: project scoped 'City of Cockburn' evaluated 118 categories

recorded.decode_library: 844 approved Melville development rules (282 boolean_presence, 234 numeric_threshold, 184 qualitative_performance, 77 conditional, 67 categorical) from 28 acquired local instruments (LPS6 scheme text, 26 LPPs incl. 3.1 Residential Development and 1.9 Height of Buildings, WAPC-endorsed Local Planning Strategy, Canning Bridge Activity Centre Plan). Pipeline: gpt-4o-mini decode (1,493 candidates) -> promote -> gpt-4o correct-don't-delete (865 kept / 406 corrected / 655 rejected) -> filter-pass pilot showed converged (25/25 kept; full redo skipped) -> SQL noise sweep (11 broken-quote rejects) -> council_scope='City of Melville'.

faithfulness_audit.note: 1 rule confirmed unfaithful by 2/3 judges (modality escalation 'will need to' -> 'must'); corrected in place post-audit (metadata_json.audit_fix). 1 additional single-judge flag did not survive majority.

gaps: LPP 1.20 (Canning Bridge density/bonus provisions) not acquired - all URL variants 404; unblock note in target_manifest.notes. The CBACP itself (acquired, 119 chunks) carries the M10/M15 provisions.
pass_or_fail (2) reflects lot-derived measurements only (site_area, frontage); other numeric checks correctly need proposal/drawing values.
